{{Infobox character
| name = Lord of Specters
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Lord of Specters]] is a spirit of death that appears as a vast raven with wings the size of ship sails.}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Lord of Specters]] can be hired with offerings to avoid soul-debts.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
